name: ai-pipeline-extension
description: VS Code/Cursor extension that plans features using full repository context.

aiPipeline.openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key used for chat and embedding requests. Leave blank to use the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

aiPipeline.model.description: Chat model name used for planning conversations.

aiPipeline.embeddingModel.description: Embedding model name used when indexing repository chunks.

aiPipeline.contextChunkSize.description: Approximate token count (characters ×4) for each indexed chunk.

aiPipeline.contextChunkOverlap.description: Number of characters to overlap between adjacent chunks.

aiPipeline.ignoredGlobs.description: Additional glob patterns to exclude from indexing (applied alongside .gitignore/.contextignore).

aiPipeline.embeddingBatchSize.description: Number of chunks embedded per API request.

aiPipeline.maxConcurrentWorkers.description: Maximum number of files to analyze in parallel during indexing.

aiPipeline.memoryBudgetMb.description: Soft memory budget (in MB) for file processing. 0 uses an automatic value based on system RAM.
